'''Flashcannons''' were large, archaic muzzle-loaded projectile weapons based on the same technology as [[Sevari]] [[Sevari Flashpistol|flashpistols]]. They were often mounted on large [[wind rider]]s.<ref name="FTS" /> [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]], in his days with the [[Gloom Walkers]], once came across three gunboats with flashcannon emplacements. Had it not been for his force abilities, he and the other Gloom Walkers probably would have been mowed down.<ref name="POD">''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''</ref>

A starship-mounted 'Dual-Core' Flashcannon was produced by the [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG:JtL">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]''</ref>
